heading: Service credit as deck officer or junior engineer for promotion purposes
label: 854a Service credit as deck officer or junior engineer for promotion purposes
text: For purposes of promotion which is now or may hereafter be authorized for officers appointed after , there shall be counted in addition to active commissioned service, service as deck officer and junior engineer.June 30, 1922
notes: CodificationProvisions similar to this section are contained in .section 3032 of this title

Amendments1955—Act , credited all service as deck officer and junior engineer.June 21, 19551949—Act , repealed that part of second proviso of subsec. (b) relating to service credit as deck officer or junior engineer for pay, longevity pay, or retirement purposes.Oct. 12, 19491948—Act , repealed subsecs. (a), (c), (d) and all of subsec. (b) except for second proviso which now comprises this section.June 3, 1948

Effective Date of 1949 Amendment, , provided that:Act Oct. 12, 1949, ch. 681, title V, § 533(a)63 Stat. 841“Except as provided in subsections (b) and (c) of this section, this Act [see Tables for classification] shall become effective on , and no pay, allowances, or benefits provided herein shall accrue to any person for any period prior thereto.”October 1, 1949
